input.memoryNote: We have spent a combined 340+ hours in the office kitchen complaining about the same three people. You are the only reason I didn't quit on week two. I've calculated this. The math is extremely concerning.

meta.tiktokHook: My work wife and I have spent 340 hours in the office kitchen complaining about the same 3 people. I calculated it. She is the only reason I'm still employed.
